variants.title: Fleetguard AF4901 Air | Replaces the Donaldson P771572
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4901 Air | Replaces the Donaldson P771572
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4901 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
specifications: Style: Air Primary, Round, Outer Diameter: 140.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 71.9 mm, Length: 341.1 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P771572 Air Primary, Round
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P771572 Air Primary, Round provides clean, efficient airflow for engines by trapping airborne contaminants. Its round design maximizes filtration surface area while maintaining high airflow rates. Perfect for heavy-duty applications, this air primary filter enhances engine longevity and supports consistent performance.
specifications: Style: Air Primary, Round, Outer Diameter: 140.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 71.9 mm, Length: 341.1 mm
